minimum_before_nat4: native policy name with accepted semantics
record schema for acceptance event and validator result
idempotent digest over support, continuity, event, and budget
snapshot/replay validator that rejects report-side acceptance
compatibility tests preserving forced-false agency claims

mutation_boundary.reason: support history replay can be recorded, but no native acceptance state mutation or validator semantics are defined

deferred_blockers.required_future_policy_records_note: Records listed here are required before future Phase 8 entry; they are not native support records opened by N12.
snapshot_replay_requirements: replay reconstructs support lanes and support survival outcomes
replay preserves disruption and explicit restoration history
replay keeps support survival distinct from identity acceptance
replay rejects hidden restoration
replay rejects report-side identity acceptance labels

minimum_before_nat4: idempotent digest over all component native records
negative controls for artifact-only and agency relabeling
minimum_before_reconsidering_nat3: native route conductance memory policy implemented and validated
native response magnitude policy implemented and validated
identity support/acceptance gate resolved or explicitly scoped

mutation_boundary.reason: no native integration meta-policy may schedule or mutate state until component native records and budget/replay contracts exist

deferred_blockers.required_future_policy_records_note: Records listed here are required before future Phase 8 entry; they are not native support records opened by N12.
snapshot_replay_requirements: replay reconstructs N11 artifact-only GALI7 chain
replay verifies each component policy record separately
replay verifies separated budget surfaces before integration gate
replay rejects missing or stale component records
replay rejects artifact-only replay relabelled fully native
replay rejects direct native support flag writes

matrix_result.supported_interpretation: Only route conductance memory and bounded/envelope-gated response magnitude are Phase 8-ready contracts. Identity acceptance and native agentic-like integration remain blocked.

node_plus_packet_budget_surface_separate.phase8_rule: conductance memory must not hide node-plus-packet budget drift
node_plus_packet_budget_surface_separate.role: kept separate from route conductance memory accounting

relaxation_destination_surface.destination: baseline route conductance or neutral geometry reservoir within the route-conductance accounting surface
relaxation_destination_surface.forbidden_interpretation: silent deletion, hidden scalar decay, or unbudgeted leakage
relaxation_destination_surface.phase8_rule: relaxation must debit and credit named surfaces through replayable digests
relaxation_destination_surface.role: receives relaxation or decay back toward baseline conductance/neutral geometry

route_conductance_memory_budget_surface.phase8_rule: every update has before/after state and budget digests
route_conductance_memory_budget_surface.role: accounts route-local conductance or geometry deltas derived from committed route use
route_conductance_memory_budget_surface.unit_boundary: digest-accounted conductance or geometry delta, not an independent scalar

idempotency_digest_plan.duplicate_update_rejection: same route_use_digest and topology_event_digest cannot mutate twice
idempotency_digest_plan.replay_digest_rule: canonical JSON digest with sorted keys and explicit before/after state

mutation_boundary.state_mutation_owner: LGRC step or committed topology event boundary

non_rc_quantity_audit.does_decay_or_relaxation_conserve_accoun: required; relaxation must debit/transfer through a named budget or destination surface

snapshot_replay_requirements: snapshot includes policy flags and disabled-by-default state
snapshot includes conductance before/after digests
snapshot includes route scope and route use digests
snapshot includes budget surface before/after digests
replay rejects missing route use, stale geometry, and duplicate updates
replay preserves no native support flags

goal_proxy_budget_surface.phase8_rule: proxy measurement remains derived observable, not new hidden state
goal_proxy_budget_surface.role: tracks proxy measurement and target-band error from runtime-visible state

node_plus_packet_budget_surface_separate.phase8_rule: response correction must conserve node-plus-packet budget
node_plus_packet_budget_surface_separate.role: ensures correction is expressed as scheduled packet work and step-owned mutation

response_magnitude_budget_surface.phase8_rule: response size must be replayable from policy, error, envelope, and budget digests
response_magnitude_budget_surface.role: accounts response gain, max correction per window, and envelope limits
response_magnitude_budget_surface.unit_boundary: response packet amount and error reduction, not semantic goal value

idempotency_digest_plan.duplicate_response_rejection: same proxy_error_digest and bounded_window_id cannot schedule two corrections
idempotency_digest_plan.replay_digest_rule: canonical JSON digest with sorted keys and explicit policy, proxy, response, and budget state

mutation_boundary.state_mutation_owner: LGRC step or committed packet scheduling event boundary

snapshot_replay_requirements: snapshot includes policy flags and disabled-by-default state
snapshot includes proxy surface and target band digests
snapshot includes error trend, saturation, and overcorrection fields
snapshot includes response packet schedule and processing digests
snapshot includes node-plus-packet and proxy budget before/after digests
replay rejects hidden optimizer state and out-of-envelope response
replay preserves no native support flags
